text.title: pm-tools-comparison Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-tools-comparison as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Scoring from vendor marketing rather than PoC measurements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vendor claims systematically overstate usability and integration quality; only measured data from your team's actual workflows is decision-grade.

failure-mode.description: Agent favors newer or more frequently mentioned online tools.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Recency bias from training data; require PoC measurements from the actual team, not sentiment from internet discussions.

failure-mode.description: Agent runs comparison and recommendation in one prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Produces anchored outputs; separate steps: (1) fill matrix, (2) forced rank, (3) draft recommendation, (4) human review.

failure-mode.description: Pricing data scraped from vendor sites without checking recency.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pricing changes frequently; require explicit date-checked URLs and mark cells older than 12 months as STALE.
